top_signals.title: Russia Starts Offering Yuan Bonds After Putin’s Visit to Beijing
top_signals.summary: Russia started accepting bids for its second sale of yuan-denominated sovereign bonds after President Vladimir Putin held talks in Beijing last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI boom squeezes optical tech and Huawei makes a chip comeback
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Number of Neets passes 1m
top_signals.summary: The number of Neets, otherwise young people not in education, employment or work, jumped past 1m in the first three months of 2026, official data has revealed.  The Office for National Statistics (ONS) has said that there were 1,012,000 young people between the ages of 16 and 24 out of work in the first three [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
